title: (BUG) messages.rs: pad() silently truncates payloads > 65532 bytes rather than erroring early
description: This is a non-issue on audit — pad() DOES return Err for payloads > 65532 bytes (line 1024-1028). The bucket search returns None, which is mapped to an Err. All call sites check the error and either skip (chat loop) or break (send loop). The pad/unpad implementation is correct. No bug.
close_reason: On re-read, pad() correctly returns Err for oversized payloads. Not a bug — closing as false positive.
